message:
feat(tui): add Ctrl-F/B detail pane scrolling, fix tree recenter header offset, unify gg/G history navigation

Three TUI navigation improvements:

1. Board detail pane scrolling: Ctrl-F and Ctrl-B now scroll the detail
   pane forward/backward by a page when in Board mode with Detail focus

2. Tree recenter (zz): account for header lines (panel header + optional
   search banner + separator) when calculating cursor position

3. gg (jump to top): works in all history view modes, not just Git;
   also resets history_bead_commit_cursor for consistent state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
